fixesApplied.description: Removed @custom-variant not-menu-open from resources/css/screen/states.css (line 5). This variant was explicitly prohibited by the user.

Replaced not-menu-open: prefixed classes on the nav element in HeaderMain.php with default collapsed classes. The mobile nav is now collapsed by default (max-md:max-h-0 max-md:opacity-0 max-md:pointer-events-none max-md:overflow-hidden) and expanded via the menu-open: variant (menu-open:max-h-[2000px] menu-open:opacity-100 menu-open:pointer-events-auto menu-open:pt-4 menu-open:pb-8). This matches the TSX pattern.
fixesApplied.action: Replaced 'not-menu-open:max-md:max-h-0 not-menu-open:max-md:opacity-0 not-menu-open:max-md:pointer-events-none' with 'max-md:max-h-0 max-md:opacity-0 max-md:pointer-events-none max-md:overflow-hidden'

fixesApplied.description: Fixed 8 prettier/prettier formatting errors in HeaderMain.tsx by running bun run lint:fix.
fixesApplied.action: Ran bun run lint:fix which auto-fixed all prettier formatting issues

fixesApplied.description: Removed unused clientId parameter from Header.tsx Edit function.
Added id props to BaseControl components in the Behaviour panel of HeaderMain.tsx.
fixesApplied.action: Added id='header-behaviour-desktop' and id='header-behaviour-mobile' to the two BaseControl components

fixesApplied.description: Fixed prettier formatting error in HeaderMainItem.tsx (handled by lint:fix in FQA-R2-003).

filesModified.change: Replaced not-menu-open: classes with default collapsed classes on nav element
Added id props to BaseControl components, prettier auto-formatting applied

syncStatus.note: PHP nav element now uses default-collapsed approach matching TSX React state pattern. Both use: collapsed by default, expanded via menu-open state/variant.
